faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How do I install a script?
faq.a1: Download the script, extract to your resources folder, add to server.cfg, and configure.
faq.a2: Each purchase generates a unique license key. The script validates this key on server start.
faq.q3: Can I use a script on multiple servers?
faq.a3: Each license is valid for one server. Contact support for multi-server licensing.
faq.a4: Updates are available for download in your account page after purchase.

footer.tagline: Premium FiveM scripts built with passion.
